events.title: Donation intake
events.detail: New drop-off from SoMa Wholesale Foods: Brown Rice (25 lb bags) × 10 bag. Received 2026-07-20 08:20. Dispatching Donation Triage Agent.

events.title: Inspecting condition and contents
events.detail: Condition reported 'good'. Declared allergens: none. Checking against the food-safety gate, open batch ingredient needs, and inventory gaps.

events.title: Triaged: kitchen ingredient
events.detail: condition good; matches an open ingredient need for scheduled batch B2 (Chicken Congee with Scallions, 100 servings on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Ingredient logged for batch B2
events.detail: Brown Rice (25 lb bags) × 10 bag booked as ingredient for batch B2 (Chicken Congee with Scallions, 100 servings on 2026-07-20). No change to scheduled labor hours.

events.title: Contrast: D006 rejected at the same gate
events.detail: Earlier intake from Anonymous Drop-off (Assorted Canned Goods (past date)) was classified non-compliant: condition 'expired' fails the food-safety intake gate — only 'good' is accepted. The gate is a hard rule, not a score.

events.title: Donation processed
events.detail: D011 routed to batch:B2. Batch B2 supplies 11 serving(s) across this week's plans, including Linda Mendoza's Tue Chicken Congee with Scallions (client 1131). 0 hard-constraint violations introduced; donation utilization updated.
